productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Check White Shorts
description: Composition Black and white plaid shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a hook and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with bow detailing and brand logo embroidered on the upper left pocket on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with these black and white plaid shorts from palm tree. The wide elasticated band offers a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. The plaid design and the bow detailing on the patch pockets on the back add to the cool vibe. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
